new_deterministic_suggestions.description: If the key has exactly one candidate value appearing in the numeric section immediately following raw_metric_name in source_text_excerpt, auto-select it.
If multiple candidates match the metric section (or none match), keep the key in manual review queue.
Keep EPS/每股收益 unit out of ratio in preview outputs.

note: Suggestion only. No formal policy/rule file changed in Stage 7G.
